description: A practical and stylish choice of bag in green from kiara. Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the quilted leather effect fabric and plait embellishments will give a sophisticated look to any outfit. Height: 25 cm Width: 32 cm Depth: 13 cm Made of leatherette for durability Quilted  pattern for high-fashion style Has two main zipped compartments, one with internal zipped pocket, one with organiser pockets Two handles attached to the bag with plaited loops, alternate long strap provided Two zippered pockets on front with magnet fastening One zipped on the front and one at the back for additional space Two zipped pockets on sides Metal stud feet on base Round metal zip pulls for style and ease of use Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
